strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Proven AI-agent and ML infrastructure contributions at re:cinq with MCP frameworks
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
concerns: No explicit Master's/PhD in AI-related field as preferred qualification
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy or customer advisory experience
AI expertise appears project-based rather than product-led at scale
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep, hands-on AI and cloud engineering experience through AI-agent tooling and scalable infrastructure work, coupled with strong technical leadership and open-source impact. However, he lacks formal AI education and documented strategic customer advisory roles, which are preferred for this director-level AI strategy role.
